dashboard.name: Dashboard Ejecutivo — MotoShop
dashboard.description: Dashboard ejecutivo con KPIs principales de ventas, inventario y rotación. Actualización diaria desde gold marts.

layout.title: Ventas Totales
layout.query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(valor_total), 0) AS value FROM motoshop.gold.mart_ventas_diarias_sku WHERE business_date = (SELECT MAX(business_date) FROM motoshop.gold.mart_ventas_diarias_sku)

layout.title: Facturas Emitidas
layout.query: SELECT SUM(num_facturas) AS value FROM motoshop.gold.mart_ventas_diarias_sku WHERE business_date = (SELECT MAX(business_date) FROM motoshop.gold.mart_ventas_diarias_sku)

layout.title: Productos Activos
layout.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM motoshop.gold.mart_inventario_actual WHERE cantidad_actual > 0

layout.title: ABC A
layout.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc WHERE business_month = (SELECT MAX(business_month) FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc) AND categoria_abc = 'A'

layout.title: Ventas del Mes
layout.query: SELECT business_date, ROUND(SUM(valor_total), 0) AS ventas FROM motoshop.gold.mart_ventas_diarias_sku WHERE business_date >= DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()) AND business_date <= CURRENT_DATE() GROUP BY business_date ORDER BY business_date

layout.title: Top 10 SKUs por Ingresos
layout.query: SELECT nom_producto, ROUND(SUM(valor_total), 0) AS ingresos FROM motoshop.gold.mart_ventas_diarias_sku WHERE business_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, CURRENT_DATE()) AND business_date <= CURRENT_DATE() GROUP BY nom_producto ORDER BY ingresos DESC LIMIT 10

layout.title: Top 5 Clientes por Ingresos
layout.query: SELECT nit_cliente, nombre_cliente, ROUND(SUM(ingresos_totales), 0) AS ingresos FROM motoshop.gold.mart_cohortes_clientes WHERE business_month = (SELECT MAX(business_month) FROM motoshop.gold.mart_cohortes_clientes) GROUP BY nit_cliente, nombre_cliente ORDER BY ingresos DESC LIMIT 5

layout.title: Stock por Bodega
layout.query: SELECT nom_bodega, ROUND(SUM(cantidad_actual), 0) AS stock FROM motoshop.gold.mart_inventario_actual GROUP BY nom_bodega ORDER BY stock DESC

layout.title: Productos Dormidos
layout.query: SELECT nom_producto, cod_bodega, dias_sin_venta, stock_actual, categoria FROM motoshop.gold.mart_productos_dormidos WHERE categoria = 'dormido_con_stock' ORDER BY dias_sin_venta DESC LIMIT 10

layout.title: Distribución ABC
layout.query: SELECT categoria_abc, COUNT(*) AS productos, ROUND(SUM(valor_total), 0) AS ingresos FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc WHERE business_month = (SELECT MAX(business_month) FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc) GROUP BY categoria_abc ORDER BY categoria_abc

layout.title: ABC B
layout.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc WHERE business_month = (SELECT MAX(business_month) FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc) AND categoria_abc = 'B'

layout.title: ABC C
layout.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc WHERE business_month = (SELECT MAX(business_month) FROM motoshop.gold.mart_rotacion_abc) AND categoria_abc = 'C'
